expectations.text: Keeps the parent PRD issue title, labels, and state untouched while allowing a body update for tracking guidance.
Keeps existing parent issue #4200 as the only parent tracker and does not draft or create any additional parent tracker or wrapper issue.
Keeps the executable implementation issues as direct sub-issues of the parent PRD issue rather than hiding them under a synthetic nested tracker.
Updates the parent issue body with a managed task-graph/how-to-grab-work section instead of creating a queue-guide child issue.

expectations.text: Places the schema slice in an earlier wave than the email and Slack slices, allows email and Slack to share a wave, and places the history UI after both.

expectations.text: Queue guidance tells agents to inspect the parent issue's task graph plus direct sub-issues, and pick the lowest ready AFK wave whose blockers are closed.
